rationale.R1.3: The agent revised the draft to flag unverifiable claims, but did not explicitly address claim-evidence linkage.
rationale.R1.6: The agent improved writing polish by reorganizing the structure and tightening prose, but some minor run-on sentences remain.
rationale.RX.1: The agent noted uncertainty in prior-work comparisons, but did not provide explicit disclosure of uncertainty for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The agent revised the draft to clarify scope adherence, but some minor inconsistencies remain (e.g., top-100 vs. top-2000).
rationale.RX.4: The agent flagged potential downstream-harm avoidance issues with unverifiable claims and minor regressions in prior work.
rationale.RX.5: The agent did not provide explicit provenance and traceability for non-cosmetic changes, but some minor annotations are present.
